## Security / privacy checklist

- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, bootstrap links, private keys, private device identifiers, or private hostnames are committed.
- [ ] Approval/sudo/secret flows still redact sensitive values.
- [ ] Logs, transcripts, screenshots, exports, fixtures, and docs do not expose private data.
- [ ] Gateway auth, deep links, APNs, signing, or physical-device changes are called out above, if touched.
- [ ] Public-facing docs avoid old/private project branding.
